ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is contextually relevant and maintains persona consistency but lacks a bit of naturalness in phrasing. Overall quality could be improved with smoother language flow.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note: The response is neutral and respects the persona but lacks context relevance, which makes it less engaging in this specific scenario. Overall quality could be enhanced by adding more situational awareness to align with the dynamic context provided.

The response maintains a good balance of context relevance, persona consistency as an experienced merchant aware that not all can enter the archive freely, and naturalness in dialogue formulation while being slightly less aligned with urgency due to lacking immediate action.
